options.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports = @(3000,3001,5000,5003,5004,5005); foreach ($port in $ports) { $processIds = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($processId in $processIds) { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Host 'Stopped processes on configured dev ports (if any were running).'"
